name: Popcorn
recipeIngredient: Sloppy hot dog or hamburger seasoning mix (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the directions on the package to cook the popcorn in a microwave.
2. Divide the cooked popcorn into two portions: keep half for future use and prepare the other half for serving.
3. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of your chosen seasoning mix over the prepared popped corn.
4. Toss or shake the seasoned popcorn gently with a fork to evenly coat it.
5. Serve and enjoy! The recipe yields approximately 4 cups, which is equivalent to one cup per serving, one bread exchange, and contains 65 calories.
Note: This recipe is suitable for diabetics due to its low calorie content and high fiber popcorn base. Adjust the seasoning mix according to personal preference without adding extra fats or sugars.
